content.html:
• Like the sequence in every good heist movie, I’m doing the rounds and reassembling the brain trust. What’s the job? Stealing something precious from someone who first stole from me.
  • Hosted a departmental all-hands and the time-keeping was ギリギリ. Since it was last thing on Friday, I closed it with the bit I’ve wanted to do since joining this company: “Have a Good Week-End!”
  • Now the proud owner of a Trader Joe's tote bag. Thanks Danny.
  • One of the appointments made a few weeks ago was kept: We returned for Kabukicho’s best curry and a few rounds of gin. Never break a promise, eh?
  • Clocked off early on Thursday to see a World Baseball Classic match: Korea vs. Czechia. Korea scored a grand slam in the first inning, and maintained a healthy lead the entire game so it was no surprise when they won. But considering that Korea’s team is pro and Czechia’s is not, I thought both sides played incredibly well. And we had a lot of fun at the match!
  • This was my first MLB-style baseball game, and I appreciated the differences/touches. The crowd-cam was fun: People popped-up, noticed that they were on camera and waved to the whole stadium!
  • Passed along my +1 martenitsa, thanks DV.
  • Exactly 10 months after the date I tried to manifest it, Paranoid London played WOMB. I went with good friends, and we made an all-nighter of it starting out at a Korean restaurant, transitioning through DIY soju-bombs on the streets and ultimately ending up in a shisha bar.
  • While they were playing we got to the booth, so now there’s footage of me vibing at the front, whilst admiring their synth-work. I got a glimpse of the book they hand-write their patches into! Unfortunately someone else snapped up the chance to fist-bump them.
  • Yeah, also, I know the samples well enough that I sang along. I wish GRNDR and Eating Glue were valid karaoke options because I’d ace them every time.
  • I went to see Drunken Kong in kabukicho the following night, which was also a great time (and again, video footage grrr) but also wiped me out all of Sunday. All I managed to do was eat a (huge) salad with MA.
  • OK so I feel spiritually nourished for the time being. I wish these had been day-raves because this is genuinely not sustainable. :(
  • Dreams of the morrow hath the shattered soul.
  • Have a Good Week-End!
content.excerpt: Like the sequence in every good heist movie, I’m doing the rounds and reassembling the brain trust.  What’s the job?  Stealing something…
